title: malaxis verticillata var. khasiana
intro: Malaxis verticillata var. khasiana, also known as Khasi Malaxis, is a type of orchid native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, antipyretic, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Malaxis verticillata var. khasiana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat wounds and skin infections due to its antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and combat various diseases.
